ourSystem.description: Music programming, talent buying, show advance, event marketing, partnerships, and on-site operations, aligned through one team, one account, and one accountable partner.

items.title: MUSIC PROGRAMMING & TALENT BUYING
items.description: Lineup direction, artist recommendations, and direct access to Tier 1 agencies across the global electronic circuit. OFFBEAT helps define who makes sense to book, then handles negotiation, contracts, and rider management under one relationship.

items.title: EVENT MARKETING & PARTNERSHIPS
items.description: Communication strategy, audience development, sponsorship packaging, and partner activation. Growth that builds community, strengthens the brand, and creates revenue beyond ticket sales.

items.title: SHOW ADVANCE
items.description: Full pre-event coordination: hospitality, technical production, and communication with the artist's team. Fewer surprises on show day.

items.title: EVENT OPERATIONS & STAFF PLANNING
items.description: Operational team assembly, staff planning, briefing, coordination, and real-time management during the event. Clear roles. Cleaner execution.

credentials.titleStart: Before offering this system to others,
credentials.description: Before launching OFFBEAT as a service, the team operated Province 44, Bijou, and several other events in Boston. This is not a retrospective case study. It is a system built in live market conditions, under real audience pressure, real budgets, and real operational complexity. Clients do not pay for experimentation. They inherit tested judgment, working methods, and years of iteration.

highlights.title: *OWN TRACK* RECORD
highlights.description: Operating Province 44 in Boston before launching OFFBEAT as a service. Every recommendation was tested first with our own reputation on the line.

highlights.title: *DIRECT* ACCESS
highlights.description: Relationships with key booking agencies across the global electronic circuit. Not contacts. Relationships built over years of delivered shows.

highlights.title: *EVENTS* OPERATED
highlights.description: $5M+ in ticket revenue · 100K+ attendees. Not aspiration. Verifiable track record.

highlights.title: PULL *QUOTE*
highlights.description: We don't sell experiments. We transfer a system.

builtFor.titleStart: If any of these situations sounds familiar,
builtFor.titleAccent: OFFBEAT is probably the system you're missing.

cards.title: THE ESTABLISHED PROMOTER
cards.description: You have the vision. We absorb the load. Scale without fragmenting. A system that replaces what used to cost you four vendors and twice the coordination.

cards.title: THE VENUE OPERATOR
cards.description: You've been let down before. We show you the track record before you commit. Province 44 has been running for 15 years. It exists so you can verify how we operate before saying yes.

cards.title: THE EMERGING PROMOTER
cards.description: You do not need to start small. You need to start with the right system. Real access to the circuit. The infrastructure that normally takes years to build, available from your first show.

cards.title: THE HOSPITALITY GROUP
cards.description: You bring the space. We bring the operating layer that makes it work. Turn your space into a cultural destination without having to build a nightlife operation from scratch.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: You do not need an elaborate brief. Tell us about the project, the venue, the artist, the objective, and the main constraint, and in 30 minutes we will tell you clearly whether OFFBEAT is the right system to make it work. If we are not the right answer, we will tell you that too.
contact.privacy: Your information is confidential and will not be shared with third parties.
contact.serviceQuestion: What service are you looking for?
services: I'm not sure yet, I want to talk

faq.eyebrow: Everything you need to know about working with OFFBEAT

items.question: What does OFFBEAT do?
items.answer: OFFBEAT is the operational infrastructure layer for nightlife. We integrate music programming, talent buying, show advance, event marketing, partnerships, and on-site operations under one accountable team.

items.question: Is OFFBEAT a booking agency?
items.answer: No. We have direct access to Tier 1 agencies across the global electronic circuit, and we handle booking as part of a larger operating system, not in isolation.

items.question: What services does OFFBEAT offer?
items.answer: Talent buying, show advance, event marketing, partnerships, event operations, and staff planning, integrated through one team and one account.

items.question: Can I hire OFFBEAT for just one service?
items.answer: Yes. Most clients start with one service area and expand once the system proves itself.

items.question: Who is OFFBEAT for?
items.answer: Established promoters, venue operators, emerging promoters, and hospitality groups who want infrastructure instead of vendors.

items.question: What makes OFFBEAT different?
items.answer: We built and operated our own venues and events for years before offering this as a service. You inherit tested judgment, not theory.

items.question: How do I contact OFFBEAT?
items.answer: Write to hello@offbeat.co or fill out the contact form on this page. We respond within 30 minutes during business hours.

footer.tagline: Operational Infrastructure for Nightlife · Boston, MA
